case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CARLOS ALEJANDRO ROSLAES BARRERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSLAES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CARLOS ALEJANDRO ROSALES BARRERA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT ROSLAES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED AUG-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSLAES BARRERA, CARLOS ALEJANDRO
